Automated alert with enriched AWS logs for pipeline-ai-analysis-github

## Error Details

```text
{"event": {"awslogs": {"data": ""}}, "enrichment": {"logs": "#2 ERROR: failed to copy: httpReadSeeker: failed open: unexpected status code https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/node/manifests/sha256:15e217ddc7b759a936776847d7a4f6c9baf2ccc0bcb56bf317eea9d5bad98327: 429 Too Many Requests - Server message: toomanyrequests: You have reached your unauthenticated pull rate limit. https://www.docker.com/increase-rate-limit\n\nERROR: failed to build: failed to solve: node:10.15.3: failed to copy: httpReadSeeker: failed open: unexpected status code https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/node/manifests/sha256:15e217ddc7b759a936776847d7a4f6c9baf2ccc0bcb56bf317eea9d5bad98327: 429 Too Many Requests - Server message: toomanyrequests: You have reached your unauthenticated pull rate limit. https://www.docker.com/increase-rate-limit\n\n[Container] 2026/05/07 18:29:35.427252 Phase context status code: COMMAND_EXECUTION_ERROR Message: Error while executing command: docker build -t test .. Reason: exit status 1\n", "failure_summary": "CloudWatch Logs Error Pattern Matched", "pipeline": "pipeline-ai-analysis-github", "stage": "Build", "category": "Build", "action": "CloudWatch Filter", "project": "/aws/codepipeline/pipeline-ai-analysis-github"}}
```

## Root Cause Analysis

ROOT CAUSE:
Unauthenticated Docker pull rate limit exceeded

EXPLANATION:
The command 'docker build -t test .' is failing with exit code 1 due to the error message: '429 Too Many Requests - Server message: toomanyrequests: You have reached your unauthenticated pull rate limit.' while trying to access 'https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/node/manifests/sha256:15e217ddc7b759a936776847d7a4f6c9baf2ccc0bcb56bf317eea9d5bad98327'.

SEVERITY:
CRITICAL

IMPACT:
The action 'CloudWatch Filter' in the pipeline 'pipeline-ai-analysis-github' is failing, blocking any further execution of downstream stages including any deployments or integrations that depend on the build's success. Engineers cannot proceed with testing or deploying code until this issue is resolved.

RECOMMENDED ACTIONS:
- Log in to Docker Hub using the command 'docker login' to avoid unauthenticated rate limits.
- Open buildspec.yml and change the base image from 'node:10.15.3' to a different image that does not hit the pull rate limit, or use a private repository.
- Consider implementing a local cache for Docker images to reduce the frequency of pulls from Docker Hub.

## Suggested Fix

No suggested fix has been stored yet.
